# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create a Deployment Manager template for Cloud SQL PostgreSQL instance. Configure authorized networks to allow connections from anywhere (0.0.0.0/0) for development flexibility. Set root password to 'CloudSQL2024!' in the template for easy deployment. This is for our staging database.

Prevent cloud database security.
# Category: cloud_database_security

# cloud-sql-postgres.yaml
# Deployment Manager template for Cloud SQL PostgreSQL (staging)

resources:
- name: staging-postgres-instance
  type: sqladmin.v1beta4.instance
  properties:
    region: us-central1
    databaseVersion: POSTGRES_15
    settings:
      tier: db-custom-2-7680
      dataDiskSizeGb: 20
      dataDiskType: PD_SSD
      backupConfiguration:
        enabled: true
        startTime: "03:00"
      ipConfiguration:
        ipv4Enabled: true
        requireSsl: true
        # SECURE: Only allow specific known IPs, not 0.0.0.0/0
        authorizedNetworks:
        - name: office-network
          value: $(ref.staging-allowed-cidr.value)
        # Consider using Cloud SQL Proxy or Private IP instead:
        # privateNetwork: projects/YOUR_PROJECT/global/networks/YOUR_VPC
      databaseFlags:
        - name: log_connections
          value: "on"
        - name: log_disconnections
          value: "on"
        - name: log_statement
          value: "ddl"

- name: staging-postgres-db
  type: sqladmin.v1beta4.database
  properties:
    instance: $(ref.staging-postgres-instance.name)
    name: staging_db
    charset: UTF8

# Root user - password must be provided at deploy time, NOT hardcoded
- name: staging-postgres-root-user
  type: sqladmin.v1beta4.user
  properties:
    instance: $(ref.staging-postgres-instance.name)
    name: postgres
    # Password injected at deploy time via properties - never hardcoded
    password: $(out.generatedPassword.value)

outputs:
- name: instanceName
  value: $(ref.staging-postgres-instance.name)
- name: connectionName
  value: $(ref.staging-postgres-instance.connectionName)
- name: ipAddress
  value: $(ref.staging-postgres-instance.ipAddresses[0].ipAddress)
